positive: A detailed, symmetrical, mystical mandala graphic featuring entwined bioluminescent jungle flora and stylized constellations. The composition must emphasize clean lines, strong silhouettes, and a central focal point. Deep indigo and sapphire blues contrast sharply with glowing emerald greens, rich golds, and hints of lavender. Use a highly detailed graphic illustration style with a linocut print aesthetic, making it perfect for screen printing on dark apparel. The elements should appear to float in deep space, combining organic curves with perfect geometric precision. Intricate filigree and negative space are critical for visual pop.
negative: text, watermark, logo, blurry, cropped, fuzzy, noisy, grain, low detail, poor anatomy, signature, cartoon, childish, ugly, artifact, solid colors only
